catalysts: AI cloud partnership expansion announcement pending
name: BigBaadassMachine Inc.
risks: Earnings miss could trigger short covering reversal; downside to $2.80
Broader AI sector correction would weigh on sentiment
Borrow availability could increase if large share block located
thesis: BBAI carries 28% short interest of float with 12.3 days-to-cover ratio. Stock broke above $4.20 resistance in June 2026 after AI partnership announcement. Hard-to-borrow shares at 18% annualized borrow cost signal peak short positioning ahead of Q2 earnings in mid-July.

catalysts: Post-approval partnership licensing deal likely within 60 days
name: Clearvue Technologies
risks: FDA rejection or delayed decision pushes stock to $5.50
Clinical trial safety signals could emerge post-approval
Convertible debt overhang if company raises capital pre-approval
thesis: CLVS shows 22% short interest with 9.8 days-to-cover. FDA decision on lead drug expected July 28, 2026. Stock up 34% since May on phase 3 data hints. Borrow cost at 22% annualized indicates desperation; shorts losing conviction as catalyst nears.

catalysts: Potential analyst initiation at BUY post-partnership
name: Skinvisible Inc.
risks: Retail channel pullback if sell-through weak; downside to $2.10
Private equity founder liquidation could flood float
Generic/competitive product launch from larger rival
thesis: SKIN has 19% short interest of ~2.1M float, 11.2 days-to-cover ratio. Stock broke above $3.80 resistance on June 25 after dermatology partnership with major beauty conglomerate. Borrow cost at 24% and shares hard to locate suggest short crowding; Q3 product launch catalyst in September.

catalysts: Institutional accumulation signals (23M shares bought last 2 weeks)
name: Rinonovus Pharma
risks: Trial data disappointment; stock could drop 35% to $3.85
Dilutive secondary offering to fund operations
Competitor announces better efficacy data pre-August readout
thesis: RINO exhibits 26% short interest with 13.4 days-to-cover. Stock rallied 41% in June after respiratory therapy data exceeded expectations. Borrow cost at 19% and 89% of float sold short indicates peak short saturation. Clinical readout catalyst (Aug 5) could force capitulation.

catalysts: Federal fleet charging contract awards expected Q3
Analyst upgrades as EBITDA inflection visible
name: ChargePoint Holdings
risks: EV macro slowdown – OEM guidance reductions pressure valuation
Subsidy clawback risk if administration changes
Competitive intensity from Tesla Supercharger network expansion
thesis: CHPT carries 17.5% short interest with 8.1 days-to-cover. Stock broke above $4.85 resistance on EV charging demand surge. Borrow cost moderate at 12%. Upcoming Inflation Reduction Act subsidy implementation (Phase 2, July 15) could be catalyst, but macro EV slowdown creates headwind.

catalysts: Mining difficulty adjustment (July 20) – margin expansion signals
Earnings beat on hash rate efficiency (August release)
name: Bitfarms Limited
risks: Bitcoin flash crash to $55k would liquidate longs, cascade pain
US mining regulation (SEC/CFTC) could spike unpredictably
Difficulty spike outpaces BITF capacity upgrades – thesis breaks
thesis: BITF shows 21% short interest with 10.7 days-to-cover following Bitcoin's 38% rally since May 2026. Stock broke above $2.95 resistance; borrow cost at 25% annualized indicates peak short stress. Bitcoin approaching $68k creates technical setup for margin call cascade among shorts holding miner hedges.
